{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260321224138315808037EEA68AAEF07\"}"},"total":17},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7513377753825903384","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者文笔不错，剧情上偏向于粉丝向，喜欢边缘行者的多半很喜欢，行文结构有些青涩，看得有些费劲，但不算太大问题，目前来看是本比较优秀的同人文如果能够改善下排版和行文习惯是能给到8分的"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1749349363,"group_id":"7498717110416198681","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"身若流火，命如草芥。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Ny6mY38tyO6tMkJoVvCex4Vu5857H8X6fTSnv5mStdr1","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/3f8870b7a7ab44519dfd3d60beab0e8c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776619908\u0026x-signature=H%2FYeT3BTt4V2Ha%2FxoOTRO9MkVTI%3D","user_id":"2905342649840734","user_name":"天鹬凉"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2905342649840734","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7498717110416198681","book_info":{"abstract":"【无限流系统+赛博朋克主世界+巨型公司+机械飞升+边缘行者+攻壳机动队+心理测量者】公元2077年，我所在的城市被评为全美最烂地区。多亏了没完没了的帮派火并，我的股票今天跌了足足百分之四！要不是荒坂、军科、沛卓、康陶还在这立着，不然我看你们连班都没得上！什么叫塔奇克马替代了暴恐机动队？什么是蓝眼睛先生被安装在西比尔系统里？这里当然是逐梦之城！和我们一起，打赢第五次公司战争吧！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o86a5eaf88242f1c269d4362d55e4e62e~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"赛博说书404","author_id":"","book_id":"7498717110416198681","book_name":"赛博朋克：我跑业务跨次元","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#084860","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category
